stories.title: PremAccounts supports stopping and restarting name markets
acceptance_criteria: PremAccounts query service supports a marketsStatus GraphQL query that returns a list of markets and their enabled/disabled statuses
PremAccounts plugin has updateMarketStatus(market name length, enable bool) to enable/disable a market
PremAccounts service has update_market_status action (market name length, enable bool) that updates the market status in the service table
PremAccounts service markets table has a new field tracking market status, updated by update_market_status and exposed via GraphQL
PremAccounts-related services/plugins are wired into the existing build system so that the repository build (for example via make and cargo-psibase build) succeeds without errors

stories.title: Markets can be explicitly started and stopped from the Config app
acceptance_criteria: Config UI has a new Premium Market Config tab
Config UI Market Config tab shows a list with columns 'Market (account name length)' and 'Status'; Market lists lengths 1–10, Status shows enabled/disabled
User can stop and restart a particular market from the PremAccounts/Config UI
